body.title: SchedulerSource: register habits at intervals, fires PROC_WORKER_FOREMAN + PROC_MEMORY_SYNC
body.result: SchedulerSource added to push_sources.py — reads habits with schedule_interval_sec metadata, calls code_ref tool on interval, pushes SCHEDULER_TICK to TWM. PROC_WORKER_FOREMAN updated with schedule_interval_sec=60.
body.description: SchedulerSource daemon thread wakes every 60s, fires overdue registered habits. Registry: [(habit_id, interval_sec, last_fired_ts)]. Boot: register PROC_WORKER_FOREMAN@60s (check queue, launch_next_worker if pending+no active worker), PROC_MEMORY_SYNC@21600s. Replaces worker_daemon.sh as primary launch path. worker_daemon.sh stays as fallback.
